creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to ml from comment #1)

> … 14.2 and ports upgraded to track 2025Q1 …

2025Q2 includes modules built for 14.2. 

Note the 1402000 part of 6.1.128.1402000_2 at <https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-61-kmod/#packages>. 

(6.1.128.1401000_2, there, was built for 14.1.)
